# AcademicForge Attribution Snapshot

Draftpaper-loop consulted AcademicForge's site-first catalog at commit `1e3ece9e82758e34ca442398bac6edcaf1c61ea6` to classify scientific skills. No AcademicForge skill source code or prose is copied into Draftpaper-loop capability templates.

AcademicForge identifies upstream collections including K-Dense-AI/scientific-agent-skills, Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs and obra/superpowers. Formal plugin provenance must point through the catalog to the exact original skill path and original license.
